result.stdout:
Usage: DependencyManager.FsProj.exe <list of projects>

This will generate a load script and output it to standard output.

To use as DependencyManager with fsi: 
dotnet fsi --compilertool:/tmp/inspectra-help-dependencymanager.fsproj-0.2.6-20ff98f97e5443b7a7240386411c4546/tool/.store/dependencymanager.fsproj/0.2.6/dependencymanager.fsproj/0.2.6/tools/net7.0/any <script-file.fsx>

To use as DependencyManager with ionide add following to your .vscode/settings.json:
"FSharp.fsiExtraParameters": [
    "--compilertool:/tmp/inspectra-help-dependencymanager.fsproj-0.2.6-20ff98f97e5443b7a7240386411c4546/tool/.store/dependencymanager.fsproj/0.2.6/dependencymanager.fsproj/0.2.6/tools/net7.0/any"
]
